task_objective: Add size guard for n_unique and other value_counts metrics
design_decisions: Introduced n_unique_threshold (default 1,000,000) to skip the expensive n_unique (singleton count) calculation on large, high-cardinality datasets. The QueryPlanner now checks both total row count and column distinct count before including n_unique in the complex metrics pass. If skipped, the report stores 'Skipped' and a warning is added to the column metadata.
results: Benchmark on 20M rows with 1 high-cardinality column showed a 5.7% speedup. All 137 tests passed.
